query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(DISTINCT contactPhone) as uniqueContacts FROM smsMessages; SELECT id, contactPhone, twilioPhone, direction, LEFT(body, 50) as bodyPreview, status, contactId, propertyId, sentByUserId, sentByName, createdAt FROM smsMessages ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
